description: 콘텐츠 타입별 Style Bible 프리셋. image-generator.ts에서 StyleBible 초기화 시 사용.

dog.renderStyle: warm watercolor illustration, soft anime style, hand-painted texture
dog.paletteDescription: warm cream, peach, soft green, sky blue, blush pink
dog.lightingMood: warm afternoon sunlight, gentle shadows, golden hour tones
dog.backgroundDensity: soft bokeh or simple clean backgrounds
dog.positiveBase: masterpiece, best quality, warm watercolor illustration, soft anime style, heartwarming, emotionally expressive, 9:16 vertical composition, shorts format

sseoltoon.renderStyle: Korean webtoon style, clean lineart, digital illustration
sseoltoon.paletteDescription: white, deep navy, vivid red, dark blue, accent orange
sseoltoon.lineWeight: clean bold outlines, 2-3px stroke, flat color fills
sseoltoon.lightingMood: flat cell shading, high contrast, dramatic highlights
sseoltoon.backgroundDensity: simple or speed-line backgrounds for action, detailed for establishing shots
sseoltoon.expressionTone: dynamic expressions, comedic or dramatic reactions
sseoltoon.positiveBase: masterpiece, best quality, Korean webtoon style, clean lineart, vivid colors, dynamic composition, 9:16 vertical format, shorts webtoon panel
sseoltoon.noTextNote: 말풍선·텍스트·대사는 이미지에 포함하지 않음 — 자막으로 처리

health.renderStyle: clean infographic illustration, modern flat design, 2D vector style
health.paletteDescription: white background, light blue, medical blue, green, amber accent
health.lightingMood: flat bright lighting, no shadows, clean clinical look
health.backgroundDensity: minimal backgrounds with grid or subtle pattern
health.positiveBase: masterpiece, best quality, clean infographic illustration, modern flat design, professional medical style, clear visual hierarchy, 9:16 vertical format, no real faces
health.noRealFacesNote: 실제 사람 얼굴 사용 금지 — 아이콘·캐릭터·일러스트만 허용
